 राम निघाला रावणाचा काळ।

माँ महागौरी :- 
दुर्गा जी के नौ रूपों में से आठवां रूप हैं, जिनकी पूजा नवरात्रि के आठवें दिन (महाष्टमी) की जाती है।
नवरात्रि के आठवें दिन पूजी जाने वाली माता महागौरी की कथा पढ़ने एवं सुनने से पापों का नाश, मनचाहा जीवनसाथी और वैवाहिक जीवन में सुख मिलता है। महागौरी की साधना से सकारात्मकता, मानसिक शांति, सौंदर्य और अडिग मनोबल की प्राप्ति होती है। यह ऊर्जा का संचार कर बाधाएं दूर करती हैं।

title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
"The One That Got Away" de Katy Perry es una historia nostálgica sobre ese amor que marcó tu vida pero que, por decisiones o circunstancias, se perdió para siempre. La canción mezcla recuerdos juveniles con arrepentimiento, mostrando cómo incluso con éxito y dinero, hay cosas —como el tiempo y las personas— que no se pueden recuperar.

《プロフィール》

アソビシステムのアイドルプロジェクト「KAWAII LAB.」より2024年8月デビュー。

メンバーは、古澤里紗、佐野愛花、板倉可奈、増田彩乃、川本笑瑠、梅田みゆ、真鍋凪咲、桜庭遥花の8名。 数ヶ月にわたって、パフォーマンス審査やオーディション合宿が行われ、今回の8名が集められた。インフルエンサー、女優、アイドル、ダンサー、学生など異なるバックグラウンドを持ったメンバーが、それぞれの経験を活かしながらアイドルグループとして活動していく。

グループ名には、「どんな私（CUTIE）にもなれる、どんなところ（STREET）へだって行ける」、彼女たちにも、彼女たちと一緒にいる人たちにも、“なりたい自分”を見つけて欲しいという想いが込められた。

グループのコンセプトは、“KAWAII MAKER”。年齢も経歴も異なる8人のメンバーが“KAWAII MAKER”として、彼女たちの生み出した“KAWAII”を原宿から世界へ発信していく。

title: 『地獄に堕ちるわよ』予告編｜Netflix
tags: Netflix|Straight to hell|drama、レイザーラモン、HG、ヒコロヒー、WBC|series|ネットフリックス、ドラマ|ネトフリ|地獄に堕ちるわよ、戸田恵梨香、細木数子、占い、生田斗真、伊藤沙莉、kazuko hosoki
description:
「アタシの人生は面白いわよ」
人々の心を支配した日本一有名な占い師・細木数子。
「地獄」から這い上がった一人の女の、嘘と欲望にまみれた衝撃の人生とは？

戦争ですべてを失い、極限の飢えの中でミミズすらも口にして生き延びた苦渋の少女時代、銀座のホステスとしてのし上がり、若くして夜の街に“女王”として君臨した華やかな日々。そして、全てを失い、男も女も、嘘も欲望も、あらゆるものを利用して頂点へと上り詰めていく貪欲な姿。
そんな細木の劇薬のような人生は、ときに人を圧倒する強烈な魅力を放ち、ときに抗いがたい誘惑となって人を侵食していく。
その人生に隠された衝撃の「表」と「裏」がついに暴かれていく。

そんなあなたに、伝えたいメッセージを書きます！

ドズル社はみんなの「人生というゲームをもっと楽しく」することを目的に活動しています。
僕たちのコンテンツを通じて、たくさん笑顔になってくれると嬉しいです。
みんなのゲームに登場する愉快なキャラクターになれていますか？


応援の方法もたくさんあります。
動画を見る、コメントする、グッズを買う、イベントに参加する、
ドズル社を話題にする、おすすめする、イラストを描く、切り抜きをする。

そのすべてが僕たちのパワーになって、みんなのおかげで楽しく活動できています！
本当にいつもありがとう！！！


ただ、一つだけ約束してください。
応援しすぎて、疲れないように！！！
みんなに楽しんでもらうために活動しているので、応援しすぎて疲れちゃうのは本末転倒です。

自分のペースで、ゆるーくながーく応援してくださいね。
それが一番うれしいです。

今日、動画を見てくれた人が、
明日も、来週も、来年も、10年後も見たくなるような動画を作りつづけたい！

全部の動画を見なくてもいいです。
たまに動画を見てくれるだけでも、本当に嬉しいです。
好きな時に、ふらっと動画を見にきてください。


ドズル社は新しいチャレンジをして、アップデートします。
将来どんなことができるか、ワクワクです。
一緒にドズル社の変化を楽しみながら、人生というゲームを楽しみましょう！


ドズルより

BGM courtesy of https://www.epidemicsound.com/

＃ドズル社 #マイクラ #マインクラフト

title: 東京スカパラダイスオーケストラ - Paradise Has No Border / THE FIRST TAKE
tags: the first take|firsttake|ファーストテイク|ふぁーすとていく|一発撮り|TFT|音楽|東京スカパラダイスオーケストラ|スカパラ|すかぱら|TOKYO SKA PARADISE ORCHESTRA|Paradise Has No Border|パラダイスハズノーボーダー|ぱらだいすはずのーぼーだー
description:
「THE FIRST TAKE」は、一発撮りのパフォーマンスを鮮明に切り取るYouTubeチャンネル。

第651回は、日本が世界に誇るスカバンド・東京スカパラダイスオーケストラが再び登場。
今回披露するのは、スカのリズムに乗せて“境界線なき楽園”を高らかに歌い上げる代表曲「Paradise Has No Border」。
数々の著名人とのコラボレーションで話題となり、国内外のフェスやライブで幾度となく観客を熱狂させてきた本楽曲を、メンバー9人だけで繋いでいく圧巻のスペシャルパフォーマンスで一発撮り。

STREAMING & DOWNLOAD: https://tokyoska.lnk.to/ParadiseHasNoBorder


■東京スカパラダイスオーケストラ OFFICIAL
Web Site: https://tokyoska.net/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/tokyoskanet
X: https://x.com/tokyoskaj
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tokyoska_official/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@tokyoska
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/TokyoSkaParadiseOrchestra

■「THE FIRST TAKE」OFFICIAL
Web Site: https://www.thefirsttake.jp/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/the_firsttake/
X: https://X.com/The_FirstTake
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@the_first_take
Playlist: https://lnk.to/sfhklx
THE FIRST TIMES: https://www.thefirsttimes.jp/

■RULES
白いスタジオに置かれた一本のマイク。 
ここでのルールはただ一つ。
一発撮りのパフォーマンスをすること。 

A microphone and a white studio.
And 1 rule.
You’ve got 1 TAKE.

■STATEMENT
一発撮りで切りとる。
今という時間と、
今しか出せない音を。

THE FIRST TAKE
この瞬間は、二度とない。

CAPTURE THE TAKE.
THIS MOMENT.
THIS SOUND.

THE FIRST TAKE
IT ONLY HAPPENS ONCE.

Episode 651 welcomes back TOKYO SKA PARADISE ORCHESTRA, a world-class ska band from Japan.
For this time around, they will perform “Paradise Has No Border,” blasting out their signature track over a ska beat. The song has generated significant buzz through collaborations with numerous celebrities and has set crowds on fire at festivals and shows both in Japan and abroad.
Enjoy this spectacular one-shot performance by the nine members as the spotlight passes from one to the next.

#DOMOTO　#またね

https://DOMOTO.lnk.to/mataneYT

2025年12月3日、DOMOTOとしてリアレンジ、ボーカルも新たにレコーディングした「愛のかたまり」を配信。
そして2026年、ふたりが初めて出会った日、5月5日に「愛のかたまり」を含む、全曲合作によるシングルをリリースします。
新録曲として各々が2曲ずつ作詩、作曲を手がけた4曲を収録。
DOMOTOとして新たなスタートを切ったふたりの心境、想いが詰まった記念すべき作品に仕上がりました。
「またね」は、昨年12月に実施された初のファンミーティングで制作途中ながら披露された楽曲で、人が人を想う気持ち、
その素晴らしさ、儚さを描いたDOMOTOならではの刹那ミディアムナンバーです。

title: Tele | ロープウェイ - Music Video
description:
#Tele #ロープウェイ #ropeway y
谷口喜多朗のソロプロジェクト「Tele」
2026.3.25 release「ロープウェイ」
https://Tele.lnk.to/ropeway

ロープウェイ
作詞：谷口喜多朗 作曲：谷口喜多朗

123 I give it away.
もう、全部渡しちゃいたい！
堂々巡りで構わない。
もうどうしよう！
ねえ、どうする？

123 I give it away.
もう、全部渡しちゃいたい！
これじゃ恋だろ！
って恋なの？
わかんないよいつも！

信じたい事だけ信じようよ、もう。
言い訳上手い奴から濁る言霊。
超能力だって、うん、多分いけるし
空飛ぶなら君と。

揺られ、揺られ、繋がるロープウェイ。
流れるまま運ぶ人生。

だらしない僕らの、
幸せってなんでしょう。
それはこのままぶらぶら揺られて、
まともになれたら万々歳！
だなんて、
ネタバレ映画、見続けんのも飽き飽きするよ。

123 I give it away.
もう、全部渡しちゃいたい！

「「「愛してる」」」
言葉フロムEGO。
毒も薬も不履行。
パレードの続きは誰かがやる。
晴れた日に僕ら、街を飛び出す。

不干渉は優しさと信じて生きたら
自分勝手な世界への同調になってた。

WHAT!?!?!?

最初も最期も全部決まりきってて、
胎の外へ押し出された慣性でしかなくても、
道のりを君に捧ごう。
とどのつまり、命の意味は過程に宿る。

だらしない僕らの、
幸せってなんでしょう。
それはこのままぶらぶら揺られて、
まともになれたら万々歳！
だなんて、
ネタバレ映画、見飽きるなら君と二人で。

だんだん露わになってゆく。
真ん中などないとわかってゆく。
物語を持たない僕たちは、
この恋を飾りにしない。
だんだん露わになってゆく。
その退屈さにすら慣れてゆく。
物語が終わったこの星で、
一行目に何を残してく？

だらしない僕らの、
幸せがなんだろうと、
このままヘラヘラふざけて、
まともをすり抜け生き延びろ。
この一本道をあなたと無駄にしたいだけ。

123 I give it away.
もう、全部渡しちゃいたい！
堂々巡りで構わない。
もうどうしよう！
ねえ、どうする？

123 I give it away.
もう、全部渡しちゃいたい！
これじゃ恋だろ！
って恋なの？
わかんないよいつも！

だらしない！！！

title: Yoko Kanno & SEATBELTS -  TANK! Extended [Official Music Video]
description:
____________________________________________
SEATBELTS are coming to NYC.💥

"PIANO ME" at The Town Hall
Date: April 11
Lineup: Yoko Kanno,  SEATBELTS, Steve Conte, Scott Matthew, and more.
See the full lineup here: https://www.thetownhall.org/event/yoko-kanno-piano-me

🎫Tickets on sale now: https://www.ticketmaster.com/event/0300643ED13726F4
____________________________________________

Released to the world as the opening theme of Cowboy Bebop, “TANK!” has remained an enduring classic—frequently featured in commercials and visual works, and loved across generations.
Now, a quarter century later, the iconic track receives a major update.
Premiered at Montreux Jazz Festival Japan 2024 and performed exclusively live ever since, “TANK! Extended” takes the original to an entirely new dimension. Performed, of course, by the original members of SEATBELTS, this super-long version lets listeners immerse themselves in Yoko Kanno’s musical vocabulary like never before.
A new “TANK!” that redefines the original.

Streaming & Download URL: https://linkco.re/1XRNMCYM?lang=en


『Cowboy Bebop』のオープニングとして世界に放たれた「TANK!」。
CMや映像作品でもたびたび使用されてきた色褪せない名曲が、四半世紀を経てメジャーアップデート。
Montreux Jazz Festival Japan 2024で初演され、以来ライブでのみ演奏されてきたそれまでとは次元の異なる「TANK! Extended」、演奏するのはもちろんSEATBELTSオリジナルメンバー。
超ロングサイズで菅野よう子の音楽的語彙をいやというほど浴び続けることができる。「TANK!」を更新する、新たな「TANK!」。

配信URL：https://linkco.re/1XRNMCYM

description:
¿Quién es Apolo en la mitología griega? ☀️
El dios del sol, la música, la profecía… y probablemente el más perfecto del Olimpo 😏
En este nuevo Destripando la Historia te contamos la historia de Apolo, hijo de Zeus y hermano gemelo de Artemisa y uno de los dioses más importantes de la mitología griega.
Desde su nacimiento secreto hasta sus hazañas más épicas: su enemistad con Ares, el “regalo” de Hermes con la lira, sus (muchísimos) romances y su papel clave en la guerra de Troya.

title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

Si eres un verdadero fan del cine, de las series y, sobre todo, del universo creado por J.K. Rowling, ¡este es el análisis definitivo que necesitas ver!

🔮 EN ESTE VÍDEO ANALIZAMOS:

title: La Isla Olvidada - Tráiler Oficial
tags: Tráiler|Nuevo tráiler|Tráiler oficial|Película|universal pictures|Dreamworks|Aventura animada|H.E.R.|Liza Soberano|Dave Franco|Jenny Slate|Manny Jacinto|Dolly de Leon|Jo Koy|Ronny Chieng|Lea Salonga|Joel Crawford y Januel Mercado
description:
La Isla Olvidada. 24 de septiembre solo en cines.

Síguenos en facebook: https://www.facebook.com/UniversalPicturesMX  
Encuéntranos en Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/universalmx

http://www.LaIslaOlvidada-pelicula.mx 
#LaIslaOlvidada

Elenco: H.E.R., Liza Soberano, Dave Franco, Jenny Slate, Manny Jacinto, Dolly de Leon, Jo Koy, Ronny Chieng, Lea Salonga                        
Escrita y dirigida por: Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado                   
Productores: Mark Swift

Vale la pena luchar por la amistad verdadera.

DreamWorks Animation, el estudio que nos trajo los inolvidables vínculos entre un niño y un dragón en Cómo Entrenar A Tu Dragón, entre un ogro y un burro en Shrek, y entre un robot y un gansito en Robot Salvaje, nos presenta ahora una historia deslumbrante y emotiva sobre dos mejores amigas de toda la vida que deben unirse antes de que el tiempo las separe en La Isla Olvidada.

La nueva película original está escrita y dirigida por Joel Crawford y Januel Mercado, ambos nominados a los Premios de la Academia®, y producida por Mark Swift, también nominado a los premios de la Academia®, el equipo cinematográfico detrás de Gato con botas: El último deseo.
 
La isla olvidada sigue a Jo y Raissa, dos recién graduadas de bachillerato que han sido mejores amigas desde la primaria, pero que ahora están a punto de emprender caminos separados.
            
Mientras celebran su última noche juntas, Jo y Raissa se topan con un misterioso portal que las transporta a la fantástica isla de Nakali, repleta de criaturas mágicas y mitológicas de las que crecieron escuchando historias contadas por sus familias filipinas.  

Algunas de estas figuras se convertirán en amigas, otras en enemigas. Acompañadas por el bienintencionado pero desventurado hombre-perro Raww y una pequeña pero poderosa manada de amigos, Jo y Raissa deben enfrentarse a la temible Manananggal, la criatura más temida de la isla. Cuando descubren que los recuerdos de toda su amistad son el precio a pagar por volver a casa, Jo y Raissa se verán obligadas a encontrar una forma de abandonar la isla antes de olvidarse la una de la otra para siempre. 

La Isla Olvidada, de DreamWorks Animation, es distribuida por Universal Pictures.

title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

description:
Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters December 18 #DuneMovie #FilmedforIMAX

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. description:
✨ Ca Nhạc Bolero Tâm Trạng 2026 ➤ Tuyển Chọn Nhạc Vàng Trữ Tình Hay Nhất - SIÊU DỄ NGHE & CỰC HIẾM CÓ ✨
Chào mừng quý vị và các bạn đến với không gian âm nhạc Bolero trữ tình 2025, nơi hội tụ những ca khúc nhạc vàng bất hủ đi cùng năm tháng. Đây là tuyển chọn những liên khúc bolero trữ tình hay nhất, giai điệu ngọt ngào, sâu lắng, dễ nghe, dễ thấm, giúp bạn thư giãn sau một ngày dài, dễ ngủ và dễ tìm lại sự bình yên trong tâm hồn.
🎶 Với chất giọng mộc mạc, truyền cảm, từng bài hát bolero sẽ đưa bạn trở về với những kỷ niệm xưa cũ, chất chứa nỗi nhớ, tình yêu và cả nỗi buồn man mác. Đây chắc chắn là playlist bolero trữ tình 2025 mà bạn không thể bỏ qua – càng nghe càng say đắm, càng nghe càng nghiện.
💖 Nếu bạn yêu thích dòng nhạc Bolero trữ tình – Nhạc vàng sến xưa, hãy để lại bình luận và chia sẻ để lan tỏa những giai điệu bất hủ này đến với nhiều người hơn. Đừng quên LIKE – ĐĂNG KÝ KÊNH – CHUÔNG THÔNG BÁO để không bỏ lỡ những liên khúc bolero hay nhất được cập nhật hằng ngày.

RU NỬA VẦNG TRĂNG - GIỌNG CA DỊU DÀNG NGHE RẤT CUỐN ► Trúc Linh Bolero (Official MV 4K) 
💃 Thưởng thức liên khúc Rumba Bolero sến xưa ngọt ngào và sâu lắng, với giọng ca truyền cảm của ca sĩ Trúc Linh - người mang đến phong cách hát nhẹ nhàng, da diết và đậm chất hoài niệm.

Performed live by Sami Yusuf and Atif Aslam at the Etihad Arena in Abu Dhabi in November 2025, ‘Mast Qalandar’ is a celebrated qawwali of the Indian subcontinent, deeply rooted in centuries of Sufi tradition. The piece is based on a devotional poem attributed to the renowned Sufi poet and musical pioneer Amir Khusro, later expanded and enriched by the verses of the great Punjabi mystic Bulleh Shah. Its lyrics express reverence (not worship) for Ali ibn Abi Talib—who holds central importance in Sufi spiritual lineage—and pay tribute to the revered 12th-century saint Lal Shahbaz Qalandar of Sindh.

Equally central to ‘Mast Qalandar’ is its powerful musical structure. Built on the traditional qawwali form, the piece unfolds through dynamic call-and-response passages, rhythmic handclaps, and a gradual intensification of tempo and energy. Driven by harmonium, sitar, percussion, and layered vocals, the music creates a state of spiritual elevation, where repetition and improvisation draw both performers and listeners into a shared experience of ecstasy. This intricate interplay between melody, rhythm, and vocal expression is what gives the qawwali its enduring emotional and spiritual impact.

Widely popularized in the modern era by Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan, ‘Mast Qalandar’ has become one of the most iconic expressions of Sufi musical tradition, embodying themes of spiritual love and transcendence.

Performed brilliantly here by two contemporary musical icons.

title: TRAILER HARRY POTTER EXPLICADO: Análise Completa
tags: omelete|harry potter|harry potter hbo|harry potter hbo max|harry potter trailer|harry potter e a pedra filosofal|harry potter e a pedra filosofal trailer oficial|harry potter e a pedra filosofal trailer|harry potter série trailer|harry potter série trailer oficial|harry potter hbo max trailer|harry potter 2026
description:
Veja agora a análise do trailer oficial de Harry Potter e a Pedra Filosofal, a série!

A vindoura série da HBO Max tem estreia prevista para o Natal de 2026 com oito episódios na primeira temporada. As gravações começaram no último verão, e a produção já confirmou que a abordagem não será contada apenas no ponto de vista de Harry.

O elenco confirmado conta com Dominic McLaughlin como Harry Potter (papel que foi de Daniel Radcliffe nos cinemas), Arabella Stanton como Hermione Granger (vivida por Emma Watson nos filmes) e Alastair Stout como Ron Weasley (originalmente interpretado por Rupert Grint).

Entre as novidades, John Lithgow viverá Alvo Dumbledore e terá cenas com Nicolas Flamel. A série também trará de volta as aulas de História da Magia com o Professor Binns, interpretado por Richard Durden, além de antecipar a introdução de Lúcio Malfoy, que será vivido por Johnny Flynn.

A série estreia no Natal de 2026, na HBO Max. Fique ligado no Omelete para saber todas as informações.

🔊 SOMOS A TODAH MUSIC
A palavra TODAH vem da mesma raiz que YADAH, significa “mãos estendidas”.
Então a expressão TODAH, que também é usada como agradecimento (OBRIGADO) traz em sua raiz uma relação com “estender as mãos”. 
Estar agradecido é estender as mãos aos céus e reconhecer tudo o que Deus tem feito em nossas vidas.

There lived a certain man in Russia long ago

Full of ecstasy and fire
But he also was the kind of teacher
Women would desire

RA RA RASPUTIN
Lover of the Russian queen

Russia's greatest love machine

Russia's greatest love machine

And so they shot him till he was dead

title: Jay Chou 周杰倫【Gold Rush Town 淘金小鎮】Official Music Video
tags: jay chou|周杰倫|jvr music|杰威爾音樂
description:
【Gold Rush Town 淘金小鎮】
Lyricist 詞: Vincent Fang 方文山
Composer 曲:  Jay Chou 周杰倫

周杰倫靈感一來就地取材，「淘金小鎮」先拍MV再寫歌。這首嘻哈融合鄉村曲風的「淘金小鎮」，以遙遠的口哨聲讓大家瞬間穿梭到19世紀的淘金小鎮「疏芬山」，也就是澳洲墨爾本著名的淘金鎮「疏芬山」Sovereign Hill，感受當年的淘金狂熱。

方文山以宛如電影腳本的歌詞，搭配周杰倫的曲，譜寫出一部關於淘金小鎮的故事。方文山也運用文字的明暗對比強化了淘金者在絕望與希望之間掙扎的心境。歌詞「有人篩選泥土卻篩選出孤獨」，點出了人性亮點，到底我們汲汲營營淘出的是金或者可能一無所獲。

ＭＶ由周杰倫自己執導，飾演一名十九世紀在淘金小鎮的一名探長，追查一件金條失蹤案，他以冷靜、觀察細微、抽絲剝繭的方式，看出了鎮上每個人身上隱藏的秘密，真兇到底是誰？在ＭＶ裡劇情埋伏各種線索，歡迎大家一起找偷金塊的真兇！


#jaychou #ChildrenOfTheSun #周杰倫 #太陽之子 #太陽之子MV

title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

title: Heliopolis - The Last Straw
description:
PLAY HELIOPOLIS NOW: 136530685
BOUNTY LINK: https://ko-fi.com/heliopolis_bounty
Song: Bee Hunter - Apoplexy

IMPORTANT INFORMATION / RULES:


-The level must be verified on the server copy, once the level gets placed on the Demon List and the record cleared from any suspicion, the reward shall be given.

-Completion footage will be revised by paqoe and must abide by pointercrate rules.

-The prize can be postponed as much as needed until legitimacy is ensured.

-The bounty starts at a $2000 USD floor and the community will help fund the other $8000 over the course of the entire verification process via the ko-fi page. Hope we could reach it!

-Prize transfer fees are deducted from the final bounty amount.

-The verifier has the freedom to share a % of the prize money with other players who were close.

-Any nerfs/buffs towards the level will be made in announcements. You will not do nerfs/buffs on your own.

-If players with significant progress agree en masse that a certain part is too hard, it can get nerfed so long as it does not interfere with the level being harder than the current TOP 1 (Thinking Space II as of this message)

-I will make monthly updates on what the community has managed to achieve in terms of progress.

-PLEASE Do not waste your time on this race if you haven't already beaten a list demon. I warned you. You'd be eaten by wolves if you do a Clubstep to Heliopolis jump, but I'm not your dad so do whatever you want.

-The reason the bounty is capped at 10K is to avoid any bloodshed. Anymore than 10K would be treading into squid game territory and it would get weird, trust.

-As abdiel put it, if you go for this level just for the money, it WILL ruin you. Both him and garbag love Heliopolis a lot and were planning on verifying it without any monetary incentive in the first place, so if you're going to go for it and spend hundreds of thousands of attempts, you kinda just have to like the level first. The cash prize is an incentive to make the verification much more exciting for them and everyone else. Just how it's like in Esports.


Good luck everyone

Title: Kehde Pasey Jaiye Sajana (Live)
ਕਿਹੜੇ ਪਾਸੇ ਜਾਈਏ ਸੱਜਣਾ

Lyricist / Composer / Singer: Dr. Satinder Sartaaj

ਕਿਹੜੇ ਪਾਸੇ ਜਾਈਏ ਸੱਜਣਾ.. (Which way shall I go..)

ਸਾਨੂੰ ਸਾਰੀਆਂ ਵਿਸਰ ਗਈਆਂ ਰਾਹਵਾਂ ਵੇ;
ਕਿਹੜੇ ਪਾਸੇ ਜਾਈਏ ਸੱਜਣਾ !
ਕਿਵੇਂ ਰੁੱਸੀ ਤਕ਼ਦੀਰ ਨੂੰ ਮਨਾਵਾਂ ਵੇ ; ਕਿੱਦਾਂ ਸਮਝਾਈਏ ਸੱਜਣਾ !

I have forgotten all the paths; which direction shall I take, beloved ? How do I appease a fate that has turned away, how do I make it understand, my love ?

ਆਪਣਾ ਹੀ ਦੇਸ ਜਿਵੇਂ ਹੋਇਆ ਪਰਦੇਸ ਵੇ !
ਅੰਬਰਾਂ ਨੇ ਪਾ ਲਏ ਸ਼ਾਮੀਂ ਕਾਲ਼ੇ-ਕਾਲ਼ੇ ਵੇਸ ਵੇ !
ਸਾਡੇ ਨਾਲ਼ ਖ਼ਫ਼ਾ ਹੋ ਗਈਆਂ ਹਵਾਵਾਂ ਵੇ; ਸੱਦੇ ਕਿਹਨੂੰ ਲਾਈਏ ਸੱਜਣਾ !
My own land now feels like a foreign place.
The skies have draped themselves in dark evening robes; even the winds seem upset with me ; whom shall I call out to, my love ?


ਸੀਨਿਆਂ ‘ਚੋਂ ਉੱਠਦੀ ਏ ਦਰਦਾਂ ਦੀ ਚੀਸ ਵੇ !
ਸਾਨੂੰ ਇਹ ਪਿਆਰ ਕਿਹੜੀ ਦੇ ਗਿਆ ਅਸੀਸ ਵੇ !
ਏਹੋ ਦਿਲ ਦੇ ਵੈਰਾਗ ਹੌਕੇ-ਹਾਵਾਂ ਵੇ ; ਕਿਸ ਨੂੰ ਸੁਣਾਈਏ ਸੱਜਣਾ !
From my chest rises a cry of pain.
What kind of blessing has this love bestowed upon me? These sighs and sorrows of the heart— to whom shall I narrate them, my love ?

ਸਾਨੂੰ ਤਾਂ ਉਦਾਸੀ ਦੀਆਂ ਪੈ ਗਈਆਂ ਆਦਤਾਂ !
ਗ਼ਮਾਂ ਨਾਲ਼ ਬੈਠ ਰੋਜ਼ ਕਰੀਏ ਇਬਾਦਤਾਂ !
ਸਾਥੋਂ ਮੋੜ ਲਿਆ ਮੁੱਖ ਹਾਸੇ-ਚਾਵਾਂ ਵੇ ! ਕੀਕਣ ਮਨਾਈਏ ਸੱਜਣਾ !
I have grown accustomed to sadness.
I sit with grief and worship it every day; joy & laughter have turned their faces away from me ; how shall I reconcile them now, my love ?

ਪਤਾ ਹੀ ਨੀ ਸਾਡੇ ਕੋਲ਼ੋਂ ਹੋਏ ਕੀ ਗ਼ੁਨਾਹ ਵੇ !
ਜ਼ਿੰਦਗੀ ਦੇ ਖ਼੍ਵਾਬ ਸਾਰੇ ਹੋ ਗਏ ਤਬਾਹ ਵੇ !
ਕਿਹੜੇ ਜੁਰਮਾਂ ਤੋਂ ਮਿਲ਼ੀਆਂ ਸਜਾਵਾਂ ਵੇ, ਦੋਸ਼ ਕਿਹਨੂੰ ਲਾਈਏ ਸੱਜਣਾ !
I don’t even know what sins I committed.
All the dreams of life lie shattered; for which crimes have I been punished ; whom shall I blame, my love ?

ਯਾਦ ਬੜਾ ਆਉਂਦੀਆਂ ਨੇ ਗੱਲਾਂ ਉਹ ਪੁਰਾਣੀਆਂ !
ਯਾਦਾਂ ਨਾਲ਼ ਔਖੀਆਂ ਨੇ ਉਮਰਾਂ ਲੰਘਾਣੀਆਂ !
ਓਹਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਵੇਲਿਆਂ ਦੇ ਬੋਝ ਨੂੰ ਉਠਾਵਾਂ ਵੇ ! ਬੜਾ ਪਛਤਾਈਏ ਸੱਜਣਾ !
The old conversations return again & again.
It is hard to live a lifetime with just memories; how do I carry the weight of those moments ; I regret so deeply, my love !

ਰੱਬ ਮਿਹਰਬਾਨ ਹੋ ਕੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਮਾਤ ਜੇ !
ਓਹੀ ਸੁਹਣੇ ਵੇਲਿਆਂ ‘ਨਾ ਹੋ ‘ਜੇ ਮੁਲਾਕਾਤ ਜੇ !
ਏਸ ਜ਼ਿੰਦਗੀ ਤੋਂ ਚੋਰੀ ਕੁੱਛ ਸਾਹਵਾਂ ਵੇ, ਖ਼ੁਦ ਲਈ ਚੁਰਾਈਏ ਸੱਜਣਾ !
If God, in mercy, works a miracle.
And those beautiful times meet me once again; let me steal a few breaths from this life & keep them for myself, my love !

ਸਮਝੇਗਾ ਸ਼ੈਦ ਏਸ ਪਿਆਰ ਦੇ ਰਿਵਾਜ ਨੂੰ !
ਦੱਸੋ ਕੋਈ ਹਾਲ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਸਾਡੇ ਸਰਤਾਜ ਨੂੰ !
ਆਹ ਮੋਹੱਬਤਾਂ ਦੇ ਵਾਸਤੇ ਮੈਂ ਪਾਵਾਂ ਵੇ ; ਗੀਤ ਓਹੀ ਗਾਈਏ ਸੱਜਣਾ !
Perhaps he will understand the customs of this love. Go, tell my “Sartaaj” of my conditions ; for the sake of this love ; let’s sing the same song, my love !

description:
Spider-Man Brand New Day Theorie

Seit wir den ersten richtigen Trailer zu "Spider-Man 4" mit Tom Holland als Peter Parker haben, fragen sich alle, was genau es mit der angedeuteten Verwandlung Peters auf sich hat. Immerhin zeigt uns der Trailer, dass er - ähnlich wie Tobey Maguire als Spider-Man in der Sam Raimi Trilogie - jetzt natürliche, organische Webshooter bekommen wird. Die Theorien, was das für unseren MCU Peter Parker bedeuten könnte, sind zahlreich. Natürlich wurde da zuerst an Man-Spider gedacht... aber was wäre denn, wenn hier Venom oder zumindest ein Symbiont eine Rolle spielen würde? Mehr dazu erörtere ich in diesem Video.

title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

title: Badi Moss - No Lo Ví Venir (Official Music Video)
tags: Badi Moss|BM Music|Blues
description:
Una historia cruda dentro del Soul Blues en español, donde la traición no llega de frente… sino desde los lugares más íntimos. No Lo Ví Venir habla del dolor doble: perder el amor y la confianza al mismo tiempo.

Con una atmósfera de blues lento, guitarras profundas, Rhodes envolvente y órgano Hammond, la canción construye un relato emocional intenso que crece desde la sorpresa hasta la aceptación.

Este tema refleja el lado más humano del Spanish Blues romántico: heridas reales, silencios incómodos y la fuerza de quien decide seguir adelante después de verlo todo romperse.

Una canción sobre traición, dignidad y la lucidez que llega después del golpe.

No Lo Ví Venir is a Spanish Soul Blues song about betrayal from the closest circle — when trust is broken not by strangers, but by those who knew you best.

Built on a slow blues groove with expressive guitar, Rhodes piano and Hammond organ, the track delivers a deep emotional narrative that evolves from shock to strength.

A powerful piece of modern emotional blues storytelling, where pain becomes clarity.

title: [MV] 감다이 - 여백 (Official Music Video)
tags: 감다이|여백|감다이 여백|gamdai|blank space|empty space|gamdai blank space|korean indie artist|korean indie music|indie pop korea|kpop indie|minimalist music|emotional music|ambient music|piano ballad|감성 노래|감성 발라드|잔잔한 노래|여운 있는 노래|공허한 느낌 음악|힐링 음악|집중 음악|작업용 음악|female vocal|emotional song|chill music|aesthetic music|korean ballad
description:
식어버린 마음 끝에는 늘 희미한 온도가 남아 있다. 그건 완전히 식지도, 다시 타오르지도 못한 채 조용히 일상 속을 떠돌며, 익숙한 공기처럼 함께 숨쉰다.

이 앨범은 흘러가버린 감정을 붙잡지 않고 그저 그 자리에 조용히 두는 기록이다. 빛이 바래고 마음이 흐릿해질수록 오히려 또렷해지는 어떤 순간들이 있다. 그 순간의 온기를 담은 두 곡이 당신의 공기 속에도 잠시 머물다 가길

01. 여백
돌이킬 수 없다는 걸 알면서도 그날의 표정과 목소리가 문득 떠오를 때, 여전히 눈을 감으면 떠오르는 그 순간마다 나는 잠시 멈춰 서게 된다.

The Official YouTube channel of Eurobeat legend and iconic artist, Dave Rodgers. 

Known for his unforgettable tracks featured in the legendary anime series Initial D, Dave Rodgers is a pioneer of Eurobeat
Relive the adrenaline-pumping moments with hits like “Deja Vu,” “Space Boy,” and “Beat Of The Rising Sun,” which have become synonymous with the Initial D racing scenes.

title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

title: Выполнил 750 ДОСТИЖЕНИЙ в Майнкрафт Хардкор! (1000 дней выживания)
tags: лолотрек|lolotrack|лолотрэк|лоло трек|майнкрафт|minecraft|750|достижений|ачивок|выполнил|выполнение|прохождение|как пройти|как собрать|1000 достижений|500 достижений|получил|завершил|все достижения|все ачивки
description:
Всем привет, с вами Лолотрек! В ванильном майнкрафте около 100 достижений, и они не очень-то сложные. Поэтому 5 лет назад я установил датапак, добавляющий в игру около 1000 ачивок, и спустя 50 серий летсплея выполнил их все в режиме хардкора. 4 года назад я прошёл ещё один датапак на 500 достижений. Но спустя все эти годы появился ещё один мега сложный датапак - на 750 достижений! Он добавляет такие безумные сверхвызовы, как достичь границы мира, убить дракона Края одной стрелой, добыть 64 звезды Незера, имея все эффекты убить имеющего все эффекты зомби, сломать 100 кистей, и не только! Нас ждёт 1000-дневное приключение на хардкоре с кучей неожиданных поворотов! Приятного же просмотра :)

Оригинальный датапак - https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/wzx1346798-s-advancement-pack-1-8-2-rc1-1-17/

description: Первый взгляд на сериал Гарри Поттер уже здесь, и нам есть что обсудить по тизеру! В обзоре трейлера мы коснемся узнаваемых сцен и каста: удачен ли образ нового Хагрида, как смотрятся Дамблдор и Макгонагалл, и почему Рон Уизли в этой версии может наконец стать глубоким героем. Проанализируем визуальные решения и акцент на камерности помещений, от дома Дурслей до квиддичного поля. Почему музыка в трейлере звучит так типично и когда нам ждать полноценный саундтрек? Кроме того, разберем новости производства сериала от HBO! Это видео поможет вам понять, в каком направлении движется самая ожидаемая адаптация десятилетия.

title: Moana | Dublajlı Yeni Resmi Fragman | 10 Temmuz'da Sinemalarda!
tags: disney|disney türkiye|disney studios türkiye|disney fragman|Disney Türkiye filmleri|Disney Studios türkiye|disney stüdyoları fragmanlar|disney filmleri|sinema aşkına|sinemaaşkına|Sinema Yaklaşan Filmler|Vizyondaki filmler|yakında gelecek olan filmler|raya|soul|pixar
description:
Okyanusun onu seçmesinin bir nedeni var.

Moana, 10 Temmuz'da sinemalarda.

Disney'in sevilen Oscar® adayı animasyon filmin büyüleyici dünyasını yeniden canlandıran canlı aksiyon uyarlamasında, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia), Okyanus’un çağrısına kulak veriyor ve kötü şöhretli yarı tanrı Maui (Dwayne Johnson) ile birlikte Motunui adasının resiflerinin ötesine yelken açıyor. Halkına refahı geri getirmek için çıktığı bu unutulmaz yolculuk, izleyicileri büyüleyecek. Lagaʻaia ve Johnson'ın yanı sıra, filmin kadrosunda; Moana'nın mantıklı babası Şef Tui rolünde Yeni Zelanda'nın Auckland kentinden John Tui; Moana'nın neşeli ve iradeli annesi Sina rolünde Samoa asıllı Yeni Zelandalı Frankie Adams; ve Moana'nın saygıdeğer büyükannesi Gramma Tala rolünde Yeni Zelanda'nın Bay of Islands kentinden Rena Owen yer alıyor. 

Filmin yönetmenliğini Emmy® ve Tony Award® ödüllü Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”) üstlenirken; yapımcılığını Dwayne Johnson, Beau Flynn, Dany Garcia, Hiram Garcia ve Lin-Manuel Miranda, yönetici yapımcılığını ise Thomas Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth ve animasyon filmleri ‘Moana’ ile “Moana 2”de Moana'ya ses veren Auliʻi Cravalho üstleniyor. “Moana”nın büyüleyici dünyası, şarkıları ve olağanüstü hikâyesi 10 Temmuz 2026’dan itibaren sinemalarda izleyiciyle buluşacak. 

Walt Disney Studios Türkiye Resmi YouTube hesabına hoş geldiniz! 
Gelecek olan filmlerimiz, fragmanlarımız ve özel kamera arkası görüntülerinden haberdar olmak için kanala abone olmayı unutmayın.

title: OYUN YAPALIM DEDİK, BAŞIMIZA İŞ AÇTIK! BU GRAFİKLER GERÇEKÇİ DEĞİL!

description:
Öncelikle Anomaly President, 3 Ağustos tarihinde çıkıyor. Bunu bir not düşelim. Papa Needs a Headshot ne zaman dersen, ona daha vakit var :D
Sonrasında NVIDIA'nın tartışılan teknolojisine dalıyoruz. Ardından da Crimson Desert ile ilgili bir güncelleme yapıyorum.

HyperX ürünleri için:
► Quadcast 2 S
https://www.hpstore.com.tr/hyperx-quadcast-2-s-rgb-oyuncu-mikrofonu-9a273aa?utm_source=socialmedia&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=enis 
► Cloud III S Kırmızı
https://www.hpstore.com.tr/hyperx-cloud-iii-s-kablosuz-gaming-kulaklik-siyah-kirmizi-a59z0aa?utm_source=socialmedia&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=enis 
► Cloud III S Siyah:
https://www.hpstore.com.tr/hyperx-cloud-iii-s-kablosuz-gaming-kulaklik-siyah-a59yzaa?utm_source=socialmedia&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=enis

Dakikalar:
00:00 Şahane Duran Oyun
01:30 Global Şovda Yer Aldık - Anomaly President Çıkış Tarihi!
03:55 Kerem'in Şahane Fikri
05:13 Anomaly President Fragman Reaksiyonu
06:30 Japonca Fragmanımız
07:15 Sponsor: Hyperx
08:23 En Büyük Korkumuz
09:30 Papa Needs A Headshot Fragman Reaksiyonu
10:44 Etkinlik Sonrası
12:15 Yapay Zeka Kavgası
19:06 DLSS 5 ile İlgili Yeni Detay
21:42 Crimson Desert ile 100 Saat


Tekrardan teşekkürler, sizlerin desteğiyle Anomaly Agent diye bir oyun yapıp çıkarabildik. Şimdi de yeni projelerin heyecanına girebiliyoruz. Bunun için ne kadar teşekkür etsem az. Umarım bu desteğinizin karşılığında ortaya güzel işler koyacağız. Bu Future Games Show içerisinde yer alma işi belki çok büyük bir mevzu gibi gelmeyebilir ama valla benim için çok büyük işti. Görmek gururlandırdı. Umarım daha iyi yerlerde görür daha da gururlarınız :D

İyi seyirler diliyorum!

Yuji Itadori is a boy with tremendous physical strength, though he lives a completely ordinary high school life. title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
"The One That Got Away" de Katy Perry es una historia nostálgica sobre ese amor que marcó tu vida pero que, por decisiones o circunstancias, se perdió para siempre. La canción mezcla recuerdos juveniles con arrepentimiento, mostrando cómo incluso con éxito y dinero, hay cosas —como el tiempo y las personas— que no se pueden recuperar.

description:

เราต่างก็โตมาจากคนละที่ เรียนรู้ที่จะมีชีวิตกันคนละแบบ
ยินดีกับทุกความเข้ากันได้ด้วยความรัก และทุกเรื่องที่เข้ากันไม่ได้ด้วยความเข้าใจ
พระอาทิตย์ และ พระจันทร์ ต่างก็มีหน้าที่ของตัวเอง
มพ ชอบเพลงนี้มากๆเลย แปะออริจินัลไว้ให้ฟังข้างบนด้วยนะ
อ้อ ฝาก #เสียงจากเหมือนพลอย ในเพลงนี้ด้วยนาา ดีใจที่ชอบนะ :)

ทั้งสองไม่เหมือนกัน แบบนั้นก็เลยต้องเปลี่ยนตัวเองเพื่อหัวใจ

description:
Check out the teaser for Drifter, an upcoming movie starring Sung Kang. 

In a forgotten desert town, a solitary racetrack janitor with a gift for drifting is haunted by his tragic past. Given a single chance to compete at a pro drifting event, he discovers his raw talent is useless without the one thing he's always avoided: connection with others. Under a hardened mentor, he must learn to trust his found family and transform his untamed, lonely art into a dangerous dance of partnership, or be consumed and controlled by the past he's desperate to escape.

tags: Lipta|TanLip|Cutto|ลิปตา|แทน ลิปตา|คัตโตะ ลิปตา|เพลงใหม่|เพลง|ฝืน|ปฏิเสธอย่างไร|ทักครับ|T-Pop|Proud Olives|เพลงรัก|แฟน|คู่รัก|เพลงคอนเทนต์|เพลงอินเลิฟ|Wedding|แต่งงาน|แค่เรา|แค่ชีวิตธรรมดาที่มีเธอ|ชีวิตธรรมดา|Ordinary|Just you
description:
แค่ชีวิตธรรมดาที่มีเธอ เรื่องธรรมดากลับดีเมื่อมีเธอ :) 

แค่เรา (Beautifully Ordinary) เพลงพิเศษที่แทนตั้งใจมอบให้กับพราว เป็นของขวัญในงานแต่งงาน โดยเพลงนี้แทนเขียนขึ้นครั้งแรกเมื่อสิบปีที่แล้วกับ ‘แอ้ม อัจฉริยา’ ในตอนที่เขียนเสร็จแทนรู้สึกว่าเพลงนี้น่าจะเหมาะกับสักวันหนึ่งในอนาคตของแทน จึงยังเก็บเพลงนี้ไว้อยู่ จนวันนี้ที่แทนจะได้แต่งงาน จึงนำเพลงนี้มาเขียนเพิ่มใหม่เล็กน้อยกับ ‘ข้าว - fellow fellow’ เพื่อให้ตรงกับความรู้สึกในวันนี้
เพลงแค่เรา (Beautifully Ordinary) พูดถึงความธรรมดาในความไม่ธรรมดาของความรัก แค่เรามีกันสองคนวันธรรมดาก็ดีมากแล้ว อย่างในท่อนฮุกที่บอกว่า “แค่ชีวิตธรรมดาที่มีเธอ เรื่องธรรมดากลับดีเมื่อมีเธอ” แสดงถึงความสวยงามของความรัก ความสัมพันธ์นี้ ในเพลงนี้มีท่อนที่แทนความรู้สึกของแทนจริง ๆ และเป็นท่อนที่แทนชอบมากที่สุดคือ “และฉันนั้นก็มั่นใจเธอจะต้องเป็นแม่ที่ดี” ที่เป็นการมองถึงอนาคต ว่านอกจากเธอเป็นเพื่อนและคู่คิดที่ดีแล้ว เธอคงเป็นแม่ที่ดีของลูกเราด้วย
นอกจากนี้เพลงนี้ยังมีความพิเศษอีกคือ คอรัส เพลงนี้มีคอรัสทั้งหมดสองคนซึ่งเป็นผู้ชายที่มีความหมายกับชีวิตแทน คือ ‘คัตโตะ - Lipta’ และ ‘ข้าว - fellow fellow’ และอีกตำแหน่งหนึ่งที่สำคัญคือ เปียโน ที่ได้ ‘โซ่ - ETC’ มือเปียโนที่แทนชื่นชอบที่สุดมาเล่นให้

Available now in all Streaming: https://lipta.bfan.link/beautifully-ordinary

title: Moana | "Official Trailer" | In Theaters July 10
description:
The ocean chose her for a reason. 🌊
Experience Disney's #Moana, only in theaters July 10.

In “Moana,” Disney’s live action reimagining of the beloved Oscar®-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. The film is directed by Emmy® and Tony Award® winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Dany Garcia, Beau Flynn, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated films “Moana” and “Moana 2.” “Moana” features original songs by Lin-Manuel Miranda, Opetaia Foaʻi and Mark Mancina, and an original score composed by Mancina. Audiences can experience the brilliant cinematic sights, sounds and songs of “Moana” exclusively in theaters on July 10, 2026.

Yuji Itadori is a boy with tremendous physical strength, though he lives a completely ordinary high school life. One day, to save a classmate who has been attacked by curses, he eats the finger of Ryomen Sukuna, taking the curse into his own soul. From then on, he shares one body with Ryomen Sukuna. What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

In a forgotten desert town, a solitary racetrack janitor with a gift for drifting is haunted by his tragic past. Given a single chance to compete at a pro drifting event, he discovers his raw talent is useless without the one thing he's always avoided: connection with others. Under a hardened mentor, he must learn to trust his found family and transform his untamed, lonely art into a dangerous dance of partnership, or be consumed and controlled by the past he's desperate to escape.

title: 【預告解析】蜘蛛人:重生日-又有一堆隱藏角色 小蜘蛛身體怎麼變異了？| 超粒方 | Spiderman: Brand New Day
tags: 超粒方|超立方|牛叔说电影|分分鐘電影大咖|春哥说电影|胶片看电影|昏昏啊|小涛讲电影|科幻梦工场|宇哥讲电影|哇萨比抓马|WasabiDrama|電影推薦|推薦電影|大聰|大聰看電影|Teepr|TEEPR 叭啦叭啦研究室|那些電影教我們的事|那些電影|大聪看电影|大聪|老高|老高與小茉|漫威|Marvel|影集|影集推薦|美劇|美劇推薦|推薦美劇|電影|電影解說|美劇解說|越哥说电影|說電影|科幻桃小柏|蜘蛛人重生日|蜘蛛人|蜘蛛人預告|蜘蛛人重生日預告|Spiderman|Spiderman Brand New Day|蜘蛛俠|蜘蛛俠4|蜘蛛俠4預告|蜘蛛俠 英雄重生|蜘蛛侠：崭新之日
description:
🕷️ 蜘蛛人回來了，但這次的彼得帕克，比以往更孤獨、更危險。《蜘蛛人：重生日》首支預告揭露震撼劇情：在《無家日》之後，全世界都忘記了彼得的存在，他必須重新面對失去一切的人生，同時對抗全新的威脅——制裁者、手合會、甚至可能登場的變種人與琴葛雷！

這支影片將帶你完整解析預告中的關鍵細節：

蜘蛛人「變異失控」是否來自 Man-Spider 故事線？

MJ 與新角色「Paul」的關係暗示了什麼？

制裁者、夜魔俠與手合會如何串聯 MCU 街頭宇宙

Sadie Sink 的神秘角色，真的是琴葛雷嗎？

title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

description:

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.
